cashier_greeting.speaker: npc
cashier_greeting.text: Welcome to the casino! Let me know how to help!

choices.label: Please explain how this place works

prizes.speaker: npc
prizes.text: Select a prize to redeem with your hard-earned chips!

choices.label: I'll take an extra cauldron.    [150 chips]
How about a new shelf.    [100 chips]
Do you have any barrels.    [80 chips]
I could really use another crate.    [50 chips]

rules.speaker: npc
rules.text: Buy chips from me, then head to the tables to play. Win more chips, then redeem them here for prizes!

choices.label: I would like to know what games you have

games_info.speaker: npc
games_info.text: Right now we've got a couple blackjack tables set up for you. More games coming soon!

anything_else.speaker: npc
anything_else.text: Let me know if there's anything else you need!

choices.label: Please explain how this place works

twins.speaker: npc
twins.text: ... Thanks for coming by! Mr. Shark will come see you sometime soon. :)

not_enough_coins.speaker: npc
not_enough_coins.text:
Oooh, you don't have enough for that. 
Minimum buy in around here is 10 coins! 
Maybe try being successful and come back.

not_enough_chips.speaker: npc
not_enough_chips.text:
Oooh, you don't have enough chips for that prize. 
Go gamble some more and come back when you have some chips to brag about.

choices.label: This casino will be the ruin of me.

exchange_success.speaker: npc
exchange_success.text:
OK, we have provided you an in-store credit for the prize you have selected with our prize-sponsor Crate & Barrel.
 
			Head next door when you want to place your prize.

choices.label: Sure thing, I'll grab my prize once I finish gambling.
